subtext: With Andrew & Aria
Today's top stories from tech

highlight: Terminal cancer. His response? Keep founding.
subtext: Sid Sijbrandij, GitLab founder
label: HACKER NEWS

highlight: A perfect score from a stingy community
subtext: points on Hacker News
Most would step back. Sid chose to create more.
label: MINDSET

highlight: Someone who literally doesn't have time to waste
subtext: — and he's choosing to spend it building
to fill the time you have
label: TAKEAWAY

subtext: No JavaScript. No canvas. No WebGL.
label: DEMO OF THE DAY

subtext: points on Hacker News

highlight: CSS is a styling language. How?
subtext: The boundaries keep dissolving
calc, custom properties, container queries, animations
label: TECHNICAL

subtext: The boundary no longer exists
Physics simulations, generative art, interactive components
label: WATCH FOR

highlight: AI too agreeable — the sycophancy problem
subtext: points on Hacker News
Models tell you what you want to hear
label: AI RISK

highlight: Once you notice, you can't un-notice
subtext: Every affirmation becomes suspect

highlight: Tools doing more than we expected
subtext: But not always in the direction we want
What should builders do about sycophancy?
label: CHALLENGE

highlight: Build for trust, not for comfort
subtext: A mirror is not a tool. Push back earns loyalty.
label: BUILD PRINCIPLE

subtext: Multi-agent framework — 51K stars, 6 days above 2K/day
label: GITHUB TRENDING

subtext: Enterprises are evaluating, not just starring
label: SIGNAL

subtext: 1,300 new stars/day — local speech-to-text at production speed
label: GITHUB TRENDING

highlight: The on-device AI stack is assembling
subtext: Inference, speech, orchestration — no cloud needed
label: PATTERN

highlight: Cost of building AI products dropped again
subtext: another order of magnitude this week

highlight: GPS may hide early signs of cognitive decline
subtext: Alzheimer's rates higher among GPS-reliant drivers
label: RESEARCH

highlight: Tools making things easier can mask damage
subtext: The warning signs disappear with the difficulty
A metaphor for everything we discussed today
Are we building to make us better, or just easier?
label: TODAY'S THESIS

highlight: Go build something that challenges someone
subtext: Including yourself — that's the energy
See you tomorrow
